case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. GARY CONANT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT CONANT, GARY
